statement.markdown: Solve the problem and fix the bugs.
statement.inputFormat: Given a string, remove leading/trailing whitespaces and return true if the string is a palindrome ignoring case and spaces.
statement.outputFormat: Return true if the string is a palindrome after removing leading/trailing whitespaces and ignoring case and spaces.
statement.notes: Time complexity: O(n), space complexity: O(n).

examples.explanation: Remove whitespaces and compare with reversed string.

hints.text: Remove leading/trailing whitespaces and convert to lowercase.

editorial.title: Validating Palindromic Sentences with Spaces
editorial.intuition: First remove leading/trailing whitespaces and convert to lowercase. Then compare the string with its reversed version.
editorial.bruteForce: Time complexity: O(n^2), space complexity: O(n).
editorial.optimalSolution: Time complexity: O(n), space complexity: O(n).
